titlestmt.titleproper: Robert F. Kennedy assassination news releases collection
Finding Aid for Robert F. Kennedy Assassination News Releases Collection LSC.2453
titlestmt.author: Finding aid prepared by Kelly Besser, 2026.

p.date: Online finding aid last updated 2026 April 27.

address.addressline: Room A1713, Charles E. Young Research Library

publicationstmt.p: Finding aid description and metadata in this record are licensed under a Creative Commons Public Domain Designation (CC0 1.0 Universal). See LSC's Metadata Rights Statement for more information.

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-05-04 11:35:13 -0700.

did.unittitle: Robert F. Kennedy assassination news releases collection
did.abstract: On Wednesday, June 5, 1968, Senator Robert F. Kennedy was shot by 24-year-old Sirhan Sirhan at the Ambassador Hotel in Los Angeles after making a speech following his victory in the state's Democratic Presidential primary election. Materials span 1968-2018 and consist of a single binder which contains news releases from the Office of the District Attorney regarding the assassination of Senator Robert F. Kennedy, organized by week in addition to news clippings concerning the aftermath.
did.physloc: Stored off-site. All requests to access special collections material must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Open for research. All requests to access special collections materials must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Reproduction and Use
userestrict.p: Property rights to the physical objects belong to UCLA Library Special Collections. All other rights, including copyright, are retained by the creators and their heirs. It is the responsibility of the researcher to determine who holds the copyright and pursue the copyright owner or his or her heir for permission to publish where The UC Regents do not hold the copyright.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: [Identification of item], Robert F. Kennedy assassination news releases collection (Collection 2453). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library, University of California, Los Angeles.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived user interest and research value, availability of staff and resources, and competing priorities. Library Special Collections provides a standard level of preservation and access for all collections and, when time and resources permit, conducts more intensive processing. These materials have been arranged and described according to national and local standards and best practices.

We are committed to providing ethical, inclusive, and anti-racist description of the materials we steward, and to remediating existing description of our materials that contains language that may be offensive or cause harm. We invite you to submit feedback about how our collections are described, and how they could be described more accurately, by filling out the form located on our website: Report Problematic Content and Description in UCLA's library collections and archives.

bioghist.head: Administrative/Biographical History
bioghist.p: On Wednesday, June 5, 1968, Senator Robert F. Kennedy was shot by 24-year-old Sirhan Sirhan at the Ambassador Hotel in Los Angeles after making a speech following his victory in the state's Democratic Presidential primary election.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials consist of a single binder which contains news releases from the Office of the District Attorney regarding the assassination of Senator Robert F. Kennedy, organized by week. Additional materials include news clippings from the 2010s concerning the assassination and its aftermath, and a guide and collection inventory for the Robert F. Kennedy Assassination Archive Collection within U Mass Dartmouth's Special Collections.

did.unittitle: News releases binder: Table of contents - Tab 17
